title: vitis peninsularis
intro: Vitis peninsularis is a plant species that is native to the Iberian Peninsula, specifically in the southwestern region of the Pyrenees Mountains. It is a type of grapevine that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Vitis peninsularis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Vitis peninsularis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
